description.value:
[2 actions] Archetype, Concentrate, Morph

You bite your thumb and blow air into your skeleton, inflating a limb to enormous proportions. Make a single unarmed Strike with reach 15 feet. On a hit, this Strike deals an additional 6d6 bludgeoning damage. The target must succeed at a DC equal to (10 + your level + your Strength modifier) Fortitude save or be knocked prone and pushed 15 feet.

Aftershock: Until the start of your next turn, your body briefly shrinks to diminutive size — your Speed is halved and you take a −2 penalty to attack rolls.

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
